narrative:
Riverside-O (precinct in Montgomery County) has 936 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.7 percentage points.
